source: China Association of Chinese Medicine Standard - Classification and Determination of TCM Constitution

questions.text: 您精力充沛吗？
questions.textEn: Do you feel energetic?
questions.note: Balanced constitution positive question, higher scores indicate tendency toward balanced constitution

questions.text: 您容易疲乏吗？
questions.textEn: Do you get tired easily?
questions.note: Balanced constitution reverse question, lower scores indicate tendency toward balanced constitution

questions.text: 您说话声音低弱无力吗？
questions.textEn: Do you speak in a weak voice?

questions.text: 您感到闷闷不乐、情绪低沉吗？
questions.textEn: Do you feel depressed?

questions.text: 比一般人容易受到惊吓吗？
questions.textEn: Are you more easily frightened than others?

questions.text: 您容易忘事（健忘）吗？
questions.textEn: Do you tend to be forgetful?

questions.text: 您容易失眠吗？
questions.textEn: Do you have trouble sleeping?

questions.text: 您容易心慌吗？
questions.textEn: Do you get heart palpitations easily?

questions.text: 您容易气短（呼吸短促）吗？
questions.textEn: Do you get short of breath easily?

questions.text: 您容易心烦吗？
questions.textEn: Do you get irritated easily?

questions.text: 您容易疲乏吗？
questions.textEn: Do you get tired easily?

questions.text: 您容易气短（呼吸短促）吗？
questions.textEn: Do you get short of breath easily?

questions.text: 您容易心慌吗？
questions.textEn: Do you get heart palpitations easily?

questions.text: 您容易头晕或站起时晕眩吗？
questions.textEn: Do you get dizzy easily or feel dizzy when standing up?

questions.text: 您比别人容易患感冒吗？
questions.textEn: Are you more susceptible to colds than others?

questions.text: 您喜欢安静、懒得说话吗？
questions.textEn: Do you prefer quietness and feel too lazy to talk?

questions.text: 您说话声音低弱无力吗？
questions.textEn: Do you speak in a weak voice?

questions.text: 您活动量稍大就容易出虚汗吗？
questions.textEn: Do you sweat easily with slight physical activity?

questions.text: 您手脚发凉吗？
questions.textEn: Do your hands and feet feel cold?

questions.text: 您胃脘部、背部或腰膝部怕冷吗？
questions.textEn: Do you feel cold in your stomach area, back, or knees?

questions.text: 您感到怕冷、衣服比别人穿得多吗？
questions.textEn: Do you feel cold and wear more clothes than others?

questions.text: 您比一般人耐受不了冬天寒冷吗？
questions.textEn: Are you less tolerant of winter cold than others?

questions.text: 您比别人容易患感冒吗？
questions.textEn: Are you more susceptible to colds than others?

questions.text: 您吃（喝）凉的东西会感到不舒服或者怕吃（喝）凉的吗？
questions.textEn: Do you feel uncomfortable eating or drinking cold things?

questions.text: 您受凉或吃（喝）凉的东西后，容易腹泻、拉肚子吗？
questions.textEn: Do you easily get diarrhea after catching cold or eating/drinking cold things?

questions.text: 您小肚子怕冷吗？
questions.textEn: Is your lower abdomen sensitive to cold?

questions.text: 您感到手脚心发热吗？
questions.textEn: Do your palms and soles feel hot?

questions.text: 您感觉身体、脸上发热吗？
questions.textEn: Do you feel hot in your body or face?

questions.text: 您皮肤或口唇干吗？
questions.textEn: Is your skin or lips dry?

questions.text: 您口唇颜色比一般人红吗？
questions.textEn: Are your lips redder than most people?

questions.text: 您容易便秘或大便干燥吗？
questions.textEn: Do you easily get constipation or dry stools?

questions.text: 您面部两颧潮红或偏红吗？
questions.textEn: Are your cheeks flushed or reddish?

questions.text: 您感到眼睛干涩吗？
questions.textEn: Do your eyes feel dry?

questions.text: 您感到口干咽燥、总想喝水吗？
questions.textEn: Do you feel dry in the mouth and throat, always wanting to drink water?

questions.text: 您感到胸闷或腹部胀满吗？
questions.textEn: Do you feel chest tightness or abdominal bloating?

questions.text: 您感到身体沉重不轻松或不爽快吗？
questions.textEn: Do you feel heavy and uncomfortable in your body?

questions.text: 您腹部肥满松软吗？
questions.textEn: Is your abdomen fat and soft?

questions.text: 您有额部油脂分泌多的现象吗？
questions.textEn: Do you have excessive oil secretion on your forehead?

questions.text: 您上眼睑比别人肿（上眼睑有轻微隆起的现象）吗？
questions.textEn: Are your upper eyelids more swollen than others?

questions.text: 您嘴里有黏黏的感觉吗？
questions.textEn: Do you have a sticky feeling in your mouth?

questions.text: 您平时痰多，特别是感到咽喉部有痰堵着吗？
questions.textEn: Do you often have phlegm, especially feeling it stuck in your throat?

questions.text: 您舌苔厚腻或有舌苔厚厚的感觉吗？
questions.textEn: Do you have a thick or greasy tongue coating?

questions.text: 您面部或鼻部有油腻感或者油亮发光吗？
questions.textEn: Does your face or nose feel oily or shiny?

questions.text: 您容易生痤疮或疮疖吗？
questions.textEn: Do you easily get acne or boils?

questions.text: 您感到口苦或嘴里有异味吗？
questions.textEn: Do you have a bitter taste in your mouth or bad breath?

questions.text: 您大便黏滞不爽、有解不尽的感觉吗？
questions.textEn: Do you have sticky stools that feel incomplete?

questions.text: 您小便时尿道有发热感、尿色深（黄）吗？
questions.textEn: Do you feel burning when urinating or have dark yellow urine?

questions.text: 您带下色黄（白带颜色发黄）吗？
questions.textEn: Is your vaginal discharge yellowish?

questions.text: 您阴囊部位潮湿吗？
questions.textEn: Is your scrotum damp?

questions.text: 您的皮肤在不知不觉中会出现青紫瘀斑（皮下出血）吗？
questions.textEn: Does your skin easily bruise without obvious cause?

questions.text: 您两颧部有细微红丝吗？
questions.textEn: Do you have fine red lines on your cheeks?

questions.text: 您身体上有哪里疼痛吗？
questions.textEn: Do you have pain anywhere in your body?

questions.text: 您面色晦暗或容易出现褐斑吗？
questions.textEn: Is your complexion dull or do you easily get brown spots?

questions.text: 您容易有黑眼圈吗？
questions.textEn: Do you easily get dark circles under your eyes?

questions.text: 您容易忘事（健忘）吗？
questions.textEn: Do you tend to be forgetful?

questions.text: 您口唇颜色偏暗吗？
questions.textEn: Are your lips dark in color?

questions.text: 您感到闷闷不乐、情绪低沉吗？
questions.textEn: Do you feel depressed?

questions.text: 您容易精神紧张、焦虑不安吗？
questions.textEn: Do you easily feel nervous or anxious?

questions.text: 您多愁善感、感情脆弱吗？
questions.textEn: Are you sentimental and emotionally fragile?

questions.text: 您容易感到害怕或受到惊吓吗？
questions.textEn: Do you easily feel scared or frightened?

questions.text: 您胁肋部或乳房胀痛吗？
questions.textEn: Do you have pain in your rib sides or breasts?

questions.text: 您无缘无故叹气吗？
questions.textEn: Do you sigh for no reason?

questions.text: 您咽喉部有异物感（梅核气）吗？
questions.textEn: Do you feel something stuck in your throat (plum pit qi)?

questions.text: 您不感冒也会打喷嚏吗？
questions.textEn: Do you sneeze even without a cold?

questions.text: 您不感冒也会鼻塞、流鼻涕吗？
questions.textEn: Do you have a stuffy or runny nose even without a cold?

questions.text: 您有因季节变化、温度变化或异味等原因而咳喘的现象吗？
questions.textEn: Do you cough or wheeze due to seasonal changes, temperature changes, or odors?

questions.text: 您容易过敏（药物、食物、气味、花粉）吗？
questions.textEn: Do you easily have allergies (to drugs, food, odors, pollen)?

questions.text: 您的皮肤起荨麻疹（风团、风疹块、风疙瘩）吗？
questions.textEn: Do you get hives (urticaria) on your skin?

questions.text: 您的皮肤因过敏出现过紫癜（紫红色瘀点、瘀斑）吗？
questions.textEn: Have you had purpura (purple spots) on your skin due to allergies?

questions.text: 您的皮肤一抓就红，并出现抓痕吗？
questions.textEn: Does your skin turn red and show scratch marks easily?

metadata.scoringFormula: Converted Score = (Raw Score - Number of Items) / (Number of Items × 4) × 100
